summary: Require raw result verification before preserving Hermes proof
description: Structural validation alone must not authorize --copy-to; durable proof copying requires doctor/first/resumed hash and semantic checks through --evidence-root.
acceptance: --copy-to without --evidence-root fails and creates no file
Validated raw evidence still permits explicit copying

evidence.summary: TDD RED proved structural-only proof could be copied without raw evidence; GREEN requires --evidence-root for --copy-to while valid raw doctor/first/resume evidence still copies. Verification: 71 tests, check-pilots, and diff check passed.
